action: In Visual Studio Code Explorer pane, right-click the blank area below the CALCULATORAPP folder name. Choose 'New Folder' and name it 'src'. Then right-click the 'src' folder, select 'New File', and name the file 'calculator_app.py'. Confirm the creation of both.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: is the first action. The task is to create a new folder named 'src' in the Visual Studio Code Explorer pane, specifically by right-clicking the blank area below the 'CALCULATORAPP' folder. I can see the 'CALCULATORAPP' folder in the Explorer pane. To start, I need to right-click the blank area below this folder to bring up the context menu for creating a new folder.

previous action: I was instructed to right-click the blank area below the 'CALCULATORAPP' folder in the Explorer pane. The current screen shows a context menu with options such as 'New File', 'New Folder', and 'Paste', which confirms that the right-click action was successful. The next step is to select 'New Folder' from this context menu to create a new folder named 'src'. The 'New Folder' option is visible in the context menu.

previous action: I was instructed to left-click the 'New Folder' option in the context menu. The expected outcome is that a new folder input box appears in the Explorer pane, allowing me to name the folder. On the current screen, I see a new folder input field with the text 'New Folder' highlighted, ready to be renamed. This confirms the previous action succeeded. The next step is to type 'src' to name the new folder.

previous action: I was instructed to type 'src' to name the new folder. The expected outcome is that the new folder in the Explorer pane is now named 'src'. On the current screen, I can see a folder named 'src' has appeared under the CALCULATORAPP folder, confirming the folder was created and named correctly. The next step is to right-click the 'src' folder to bring up the context menu for creating a new file inside it.

previous action: I was instructed to right-click the 'src' folder to bring up the context menu for creating a new file. The expected outcome is that a context menu appears with options such as 'New File', 'New Folder', etc. On the current screen, I can see a context menu next to the 'src' folder, confirming the right-click was successful. The next step is to select 'New File' from this context menu to create a new file inside the 'src' folder.

previous action: I was instructed to left-click the 'New File' option in the context menu for the 'src' folder. The expected outcome is that an input field appears under the 'src' folder, allowing me to name the new file. On the current screen, I see an input box under the 'src' folder, ready to be renamed, which confirms the previous action succeeded. The next step is to type 'calculator_app.py' to name the new file.
